sentences.target: Ich frage die Kellnerin nach Leitungswasser.

translations.de: Ich frage die Kellnerin nach Leitungswasser.
translations.en: I ask the waitress for tap water.
translations.es: Le pido a la camarera agua del grifo.
translations.fr: Je demande de l'eau du robinet à la serveuse.
translations.it: Chiedo alla cameriera dell'acqua del rubinetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向女服务员要一杯自来水。
translations.ru: Я прошу у официантки воду из-под крана.
translations.pt: Peço à garçonete água da torneira.
translations.vi: Tôi xin cô phục vụ nước máy.
translations.ar: أطلب من النادلة ماءً من الصنبور.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de serveerster om kraanwater.
translations.uk: Я прошу в офіціантки воду з-під крана.
translations.hi: मैं वेट्रेस से नल का पानी माँगता हूँ.
translations.pl: Proszę kelnerkę o wodę z kranu.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τη σερβιτόρα νερό βρύσης.
translations.id: Saya minta air keran kepada pelayan wanita.
translations.ro: Îi cer chelneriței apă de la robinet.
translations.ja: ウェイトレスに水道水をお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the verb 'frage'.
Main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; selects a direct object ('die Kellnerin') and a prepositional object ('nach Leitungswasser').
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kellnerin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative) of 'frage'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces the thing being asked for.
Common noun, neuter singular; prepositional object of 'nach' (dative).

sentences.target: Die Kellnerin bringt gleich die Rechnung.

translations.de: Die Kellnerin bringt gleich die Rechnung.
translations.en: The waitress will bring the bill soon.
translations.es: La camarera traerá la cuenta enseguida.
translations.fr: La serveuse va bientôt apporter l'addition.
translations.it: La cameriera porterà il conto tra poco.
translations.zh-Hans: 女服务员很快就会拿来账单。
translations.yue: 女侍應好快就會拎單嚟。
translations.pt: A garçonete vai trazer a conta em breve.
translations.vi: Cô phục vụ sẽ mang hóa đơn ra sớm.
translations.nl: De serveerster brengt zo de rekening.
translations.hu: A pincérnő mindjárt hozza a számlát.
translations.hi: वेट्रेस जल्द ही बिल लेकर आएगी.
translations.el: Η σερβιτόρα θα φέρει τον λογαριασμό σύντομα.
translations.id: Pelayan wanita akan segera membawa tagihan.
translations.ro: Chelnerița va aduce nota de plată curând.
translations.ja: ウェイトレスはもうすぐお会計を持ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of 'Kellnerin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'bringt'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; transitive, taking 'die Rechnung' as direct object.
Temporal adverb meaning 'soon/right away'; modifies the verb 'bringt'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Rechnung'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'bringt'.

sentences.target: Du kennst die neue Kellnerin hier.

translations.de: Du kennst die neue Kellnerin hier.
translations.en: You know the new waitress here.
translations.es: Conoces a la nueva camarera de aquí.
translations.fr: Tu connais la nouvelle serveuse ici.
translations.ko: 너는 여기 새로 온 웨이트리스를 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识这里的新女服务员。
translations.pt: Você conhece a nova garçonete daqui.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את המלצרית החדשה כאן.
translations.vi: Bạn biết cô phục vụ mới ở đây.
translations.nl: Je kent de nieuwe serveerster hier.
translations.hi: तुम यहाँ की नई वेट्रेस को जानते हो.
translations.nb: Du kjenner den nye servitrisen her.
translations.id: Kamu kenal pelayan wanita baru di sini.
translations.sv: Du känner den nya servitrisen här.
translations.ro: O cunoști pe chelnerița nouă de aici.
translations.da: Du kender den nye servitrice her.
translations.ja: あなたはここの新しいウェイトレスを知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of 'kennst'.
Main verb, 2nd person singular, present indicative; takes 'die neue Kellnerin' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kellnerin'.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Kellnerin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'kennst'.
Deictic/locative adverb; gives location/context ('here'), modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Die Kellnerin ist heute besonders freundlich.

translations.de: Die Kellnerin ist heute besonders freundlich.
translations.en: The waitress is especially friendly today.
translations.es: Hoy la camarera está especialmente amable.
translations.fr: La serveuse est particulièrement aimable aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi la cameriera è particolarmente gentile.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这位女服务员格外友好。
translations.yue: 今日個女侍應特別友善。
translations.pt: Hoje a garçonete está especialmente simpática.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô phục vụ đặc biệt thân thiện.
translations.nl: De serveerster is vandaag extra vriendelijk.
translations.hi: वेट्रेस आज खास तौर पर दोस्ताना है.
translations.el: Η σερβιτόρα είναι σήμερα ιδιαίτερα φιλική.
translations.nb: Servitrisen er spesielt hyggelig i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini pelayan wanita sangat ramah.
translations.sv: Servitrisen är extra trevlig i dag.
translations.ro: Chelnerița este astăzi deosebit de amabilă.
translations.da: Servitricen er i dag særlig venlig.
translations.ja: 今日はウェイトレスが特に親切です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of 'Kellnerin'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'ist'.
Copula 'sein', 3rd person singular, present; links the subject with the predicate adjective 'freundlich'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause/verb 'ist'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate adjective 'freundlich'.
Predicate adjective; predicative complement in copular construction with 'ist'.
